summary: This document is a Standard Operating Procedure outlining the process for transferring product designs to manufacturing sites, whether internal or via contract manufacturers. It details the responsibilities of various teams including Quality, Regulatory Affairs, and Manufacturing Engineering, along with a phase-gate system for managing transfer activities. The SOP ensures compliance with regulatory requirements and maintains design intent during the transition to production.
